## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on progress and next steps for the Looker Exit project, focusing on analytics implementation and UI refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Project is near completion, with backend work wrapping up and UI refinements ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Team to implement OAuth for easier account setup and data ingestion](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
  - [Marcel to create mockups for analytics views, emphasizing standardized, user-friendly layouts](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Plan to merge current progress to production for testing, then roll out comprehensively next week](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)

## Topics

### Project Status and Progress

  - [Pedro is finalizing backend work, addressing PR comments and moving API calls to Temporal](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Gianpiero cleaned up development seeds, creating a streamlined setup process](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [UI for traffic and Google Search Console data is mostly complete, pending refinements](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Analytics UI Discussion

  - [Current layout includes traffic and Google Search tabs, with plans to add AI search](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Team discussed adding a dedicated LLM (Large Language Model) traffic section](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized the need for standardized, user-friendly views with easy-to-use filters and toggles](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Suggestion to consolidate views, potentially using toggles to switch between pages and referrers](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)

### Data Ingestion and Testing

  - [Plan to start ingesting real data into production for testing purposes](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
  - [Ramp suggested as a good initial test case due to their heavy use of Profound and Aerox](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [Discussion on creating realistic seed data for development and staging environments](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)

### Staging Environment

  - [Team recognized the need for a staging environment to facilitate easier review and testing](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Proposal to set up production and staging deploys, allowing for easier branch testing and overrides](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

### Client Experience and Rollout

  - [Consideration of client-facing analytics experience, potentially a simplified, opinionated view](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [Discussion on the importance of proper training and documentation for the rollout](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2195.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized the urgency of starting data ingestion to build a substantial dataset](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2175.0)

### OAuth Implementation

  - [Pedro to implement OAuth to simplify account setup and data access for delivery users](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Pedro to merge current branch to production and start ingesting real data for testing](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
  - [Marcel to create mockups for analytics views, including LLM traffic section](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Gianpiero to work on consolidating and standardizing UI patterns across tabs](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2311.0)
  - [Team to implement OAuth for easier account setup](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
  - [Plan comprehensive rollout for next week, including training and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [Consider setting up a staging environment for easier testing and review](https://fathom.video/share/yrfQfysnrYMygia17qmbfXUkujs4MQSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
